title: Chapter 87 – Battle for Possession (6)
content:
"......"

Jeong Yeon-shin, clad in the pure blood robe and demon mask, stepped forward slowly.

In this moment, he had to act as a rising disciple counted among Blood Flame Sect's finest. He had heard from the Seventh Apostle.

The pure blood robe was a treasure bestowed upon Apostles.

'My martial might hasn't yet reached Apostle level. I should model myself after Gao Zong-xue.'

Even the Blood Flame Sect had its nobility. Families as old as the main hall's history had naturally formed entrenched privileges.

The Third Apostle's son was one such figure. Gao Zong-xue. He was the one who had constantly checked Jeong Yeon-shin at the headquarters.

He had died while forcing energy absorption on a boy who hadn't even learned martial arts. Jeong Yeon-shin remembered slicing his neck.

He decided to impersonate that man.

STEP.

His gait was leisurely. He held his upper body straight.

He projected the bearing of one who looked down on all under heaven. He placed himself under self-suggestion.

Outside the main hall, there was none more noble than himself. All others were worthless insects.

He approached Namgung Mi in the seat of honor without hesitation, measuring his timing while concealing the effort.

"Hmm..."

"Seems no ordinary status..."

The guests who called themselves orthodox martial artists could not move. They must have recognized the Blood Flame Sect connection.

They were overwhelmed by Jeong Yeon-shin's appearance and energy waves.

It was a bearing that few in the local murim could withstand. He was operating Demon Roaring Blood Technique at Desolate Fortress blue-rank level.

One after another, they lowered their eyes. These were people who had long kept silent before the evil sect Virtuous Teacher Sect.

Their earlier display of indignant shouting at Namgung Mi's prompting was nowhere to be seen. Practically no martial artist present could hold their composure before Jeong Yeon-shin.

The Namgung family was different.

"A blood demon here?"

"Could it be an Apostle's bloodline."

As Namgung family warriors immediately rose to draw their swords, Namgung Mi raised her hand slightly, a strange smile on her lips.

Her fingers, smooth and white enough to be called jade, stopped them.

"I like the fruit's color."

Jeong Yeon-shin said. He still had true qi loaded in the Heaven's Edge blood point at his nape.

Alongside deliberately produced rupturing sounds, an eerie voice emerged with deep resonance.

He arrived close with unhurried steps, positioning himself diagonally to Namgung Mi's left.

SWISH.

He picked up a peach. Rather than fighting recklessly, the purpose was to distance his current Blood Flame Sect identity from himself.

Though energy waves could differ, he could not change his build. He had to prevent anyone from recalling Desolate Fortress's Lightning Genius.

'Actions far removed from myself.'

Jeong Yeon-shin was trying to provoke another person for the first time in his life. He wasn't confident. Could he pull it off?

"This fruit is wasted on these lowly things."

He lifted his indifferent tone slightly. He meant to sound arrogant. It suited him.

He was puzzled to find it more comfortable than expected.

"......"

None raised their heads except the Namgung family masters. The act seemed to be working unexpectedly well.

He wasn't sure how he appeared wearing the precious pure blood robe and demon mask while operating the Demon Roaring Blood Technique.

Did he appear as a complete Blood Flame Sect noble in their eyes?

That was when Namgung Mi parted her lips.

"I was about to take that. Doesn't that white peach flesh suit me better?"

She slowly crossed her legs. Their gazes met as she gave a slight smile.

Her words continued smoothly.

"A blood demon playing noble before me. Perhaps your kind feels inferior to the main fortress? You don't know your place."

"Your tongue is long."

"What?"

"A head that will soon fall moves its mouth too much."

Jeong Yeon-shin spoke leisurely through the demon mask.

Then he moved his hand.

He casually tossed the peach he was holding at Namgung Mi's nape. He paid no mind to the gasps around him.

She stood without dodging. The rolling fruit was gently crushed under her fine leather shoe.

"Seems you came to siphon some true qi after hearing the rumors."

She spoke with a smile.

"Kill him."

As Namgung Mi finished speaking, she gathered the full force of her body. She recalled the energy waves the blood-robed demon had displayed.

He was not one to be underestimated. She planned to gauge his strength using the Flourishing Spirit Flower warriors as extensions of herself.

'Before that.'

She intended to dull his body with energy techniques first.

The cold of the Human-Shaped Snow Ginseng rose chillingly from her dantian.

As she raised her hand, enduring pain like her blood vessels were burning, frost formed around her body. It was a sparkling wave of five-colored light.

Even the appearance befitted her nobility. She was certain the effectiveness would match.

WHOOSH!

It happened in an instant. The moment white mist burst from Namgung Mi's entire body, the demon's body suddenly stopped.

The internal energy's cold was faster than any sword strike. She retreated with mincing steps, smirking.

Flourishing Spirit Flower warriors rushed in from all directions. Chaos erupted in an instant.

Sword clashes rang loudly amid food and alcohol scattering everywhere.

CLANG!

Jeong Yeon-shin felt the vibration climb up to his right hand gripping the sword.

The first attacker was fast, but he blocked with the blade of his iron sword, not yet fully drawn. His movements had clearly slowed.

What penetrated his body was no ordinary cold energy. It should be understood as possessing the properties of an internal-disrupting hand technique.

Even so, his muscle strength remained unchanged.

"Your sword force is pathetic."

Jeong Yeon-shin spoke calmly from within the demon mask.

His defense did not waver. When the Namgung man flinched, he struck without delay, catching his jaw with the back of his left hand.

The THUD was loud. The man bounced away, consciousness gone, eyes rolling back.

"HEOK!"

It was a death rattle. He flew backward, out cold before he hit the ground.

Jeong Yeon-shin knew immediately after delivering the strike. He could handle this without resorting to his unique martial art techniques.

He had become quite strong. He had well surpassed the entry level of blue rank, at least.

He advanced without stopping. He could clear away any blind sword strikes that came flying first.

He was grateful for Namgung Mi's decision to use her subordinates as expendables.

'This is how I must fight.'

It was the moment he greatly intensified the flow of Demon Roaring Blood Technique.

"Sword Formation!"

Another Namgung man shouted. His voice was urgent.

Sword Formation. A tactic where multiple swordsmen gathered to add connectivity to their techniques.

Seeing Jeong Yeon-shin's strikes, they must have decided on a joint attack. A separate world unfolded as the crowd suddenly fell away.

It was a confrontation between five Flourishing Spirit Flower warriors and the demon mask.

Jeong Yeon-shin narrowed his eyes. The Namgung men swung their swords while occupying every direction before him.

He responded immediately with swift sword verses, and the iron sword provided by Namgung Hwa-sin moved at a speed matching theirs.

Gradually, his entire body's meridians began to ache. The cold energy erosion was remarkable.

'I've become quite dull.'

It did not matter.

He combined evasion and counterattack while moving slowly. His sense of timing had reached the realm of instinct.

He was extraordinarily sharp despite the dulling skin sensation. He inserted sword strikes while avoiding five blades by a hair's breadth.

Once each. Once each. Five was enough.

Jeong Yeon-shin raised the iron sword he had pulled from a fallen warrior's abdomen. This one was the last.

Very slowly, blood flowing down the blade created silence.

The pure red robe seemed wrapped in noble killing intent.

The Namgung family Flourishing Spirit Flower warriors' blood looked like dirty stains in comparison.

"......"

While everyone held their breath, Namgung Mi still had not moved.

It was a fight between masters. Hasty intervention could disrupt the sequence of moves.

She was the Flourishing Spirit Flower Master. What did it matter how she used her subordinates?

It was enough to observe how long the enemy's displayed martial might would endure.

Only then did Namgung Mi take a step.

"Your eye technique training doesn't seem deep."

She opened her mouth while approaching slowly.

"Your sense of distance is quite excellent. You measure timing well. Is it innate?"

Her tone was relaxed. She had confirmed the demon mask's increasingly sluggish movements.

The Human-Shaped Snow Ginseng energy, melted through pain, was that powerful. It was power that reached another realm entirely.

Jeong Yeon-shin stood still, watching her.

A sensation like frostbite swept his entire body. The aftermath was severe despite exposure to only a single strike.

As expected, had he not mastered the Jeong family dynamic technique, he could not have even considered fighting her.

'I can't use unique martial arts.'

He could not deploy the new palm technique here. It was a martial art with distinct characteristics.

It could only be used at moments when revealing his identity did not matter.

RUSTLE. RUSTLE.

Namgung Mi approached with a smile.

Though not careless, she closed the distance without hesitation.

Her confidence in her cold energy seemed truly tremendous. And the martial arts warranted it.

She had completely grasped his internal energy. She had precisely observed Jeong Yeon-shin's condition, gradually making it harder for him to control his own body.

"Let's see?"

She extended her snow-white hand after drawing close, almost like a lover. She lightly touched the demon mask covering Jeong Yeon-shin's face.

"Your ugly face first."

Her lips drew a thin arc. It was a truly defenseless-looking gesture.

Her wicked nature showed through directly.

It was behavior meant to bestow the ultimate humiliation on a martial arts opponent.

'Good.'

Jeong Yeon-shin thought. His mention of ten seconds had been for formal martial matches.

He had no intention of facing her with a righteous attitude. He had meant to reveal openings to draw her in, but he hadn't expected her to actually come this close.

His murim was different from hers. It was a struggle for life.

He wanted to cleanly defeat an opponent he had never faced before.

'I can do it. Lazy Flame Dragon was stronger.'

The internal energy density of the Hwangbo young master, who had trained the Scorching Divine Meridian's innate heat, was even higher.

Jeong Yeon-shin recalled a technique he had been inspired to develop after observing him.

He had learned that many so-called masters in the murim could employ this martial art.

'Three Samadhi True Fire.'

He had been activating it since she took her first step. It was a technique that caused vibrations from the smallest units of true qi.

Movement itself generates fire energy. Unlike Lazy Flame Dragon's immediate heat emission, born of the Scorching Divine Meridian.

It was an internal master's delicate true qi manipulation.

WOONG.

A resonance bloomed inside his body.

He felt it clearly. The cold energy throughout his meridians crackled and burned away.

His entire body, hardened like steel by the Jeong family dynamic technique, absorbed the heat and vibrations completely. The Demon Roaring Blood Technique's operation path whirled through his whole body in a destructive flow.

A crackling sensation rippled through every blood point, including the twelve regular meridians and eight extraordinary vessels.

He could sustain this all day. The enemy had not detected his body's thawing.

Jeong Yeon-shin immediately activated the Radiant Demon Technique.

When the upper dantian in his mind flashed intensely, Radiant Demon Wing's unique martial art absorbed all information.

The two people's postures, Namgung Mi's breath mixed with laughter, even her gaze fixed on the mask.

Within all of that.

An invisible trajectory arose. A net of light visible only to Jeong Yeon-shin's eyes.

It was the Radiant Demon Technique's path. The boy followed it exactly. A move beginning from the right elbow, barely moving the shoulder at the end.

SWISH.

Just before Namgung Mi removed Jeong Yeon-shin's mask, he seized her neck.

It was a perfectly natural movement.

He had created a moment of instantaneous superiority by combining Namgung Mi's rock-solid confidence, the Radiant Demon Technique's path advancing through blind spots, timing converging to nothing, and strikes suddenly accelerated by the destruction of cold energy.

Radiant Demon Wing's Lightning Genius was a fighter.

"...!"

The smooth nape came into his firm grip. Namgung Mi's eyes grew wider than ever before.

Had she ever experienced being subdued so absurdly in her life? She would have neither heard nor seen such a thing.

Jeong Yeon-shin slowly opened his mouth.

"The noble of the world's blood lineage commands."

"Heuk...!"

"You lowly Namgung seed."

With his words, the blood technique responded. He felt as though his body -- tempered by the Jeong family dynamic technique -- was being flung wide open.

The mental image of this moment added to the thought forming the verse.

'He said she gave all sorts of humiliation. To Young Hero Namgung's mother.'

They said one who lacked nothing had committed every kind of evil. Jeong Yeon-shin thought.

Would he not be more dignified than this Namgung Mi? It was a thought he had never entertained before.

Arrogant thoughts sprouted in his mind.

He said:

"Kneel."

It was before many attendees. When he poured sincerity into the spoken words, he felt a strange sensation.

The energy drawn into the Demon Roaring Blood Technique's flow was slightly amplified. It meant the amount of energy accumulation had increased.

The torrent-like true qi flow seemed to laugh ominously. As if saying this was how blood art should be operated.

'This too is enlightenment.'

Jeong Yeon-shin opened his mouth once more. This time, he filled it completely with contempt.

"What are you doing, trash?"

"This... this..."

Namgung Mi could not continue speaking. She showed no signs of movement.

It was because he had sealed her blood points the moment he grabbed her neck. He had paralyzed her body with point sealing.

Even if she wanted to kneel, she could not. Control of her body had passed into Jeong Yeon-shin's grasp.

"You still refuse to move. Quite stubborn."

"Kuh... kek..."

The boy holding Namgung Mi's neck laughed slowly behind the demon mask.

The pure blood robe's hem, reaching to his feet, fluttered like scattered blood. It was an eerie and haunting sight.
